provenance.citation: Y. Sung et al., "Realization of High-Fidelity CZ and ZZ-Free iSWAP Gates with a Tunable Coupler", Phys. Rev. X 11, 021058 (2021)
provenance.notes: Tunable-coupler (parametric) CZ, 60 ns. Measured F_avg = 99.76% by interleaved RB; the authors report the gate is close to its T1 limit (~99.85%), i.e. coherence-limited -- so a pure T1/T_phi floor is expected to reproduce the measured number, not merely bound it. Device parameters here are the published representative values used for the gradpulse decoherence-model check; they reproduce the numbers in the prior hardcoded validate_sung_cz().
